ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Adumbrati academici Ociosi Oratio habita in finere Camillii Vizanii Incerti Academici Ociosi
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The Italian translation of the title is: Orazione funebre in onore di Camillo Vezzani. Inc.: `si florentissimae Romanae Reipublicae celeberrimi illius Camilli interitus...` Expl.: `...duce adherere cupit quosque mortalitatem exutus, tecumque iterum coniunctus divina simul pulchritudine perfruatur.`
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
